title: Episodes
section: A Blast from the Past: CHORDCast
text:
A Blast from the Past: CHORDCast
Did you know there was an HSMA podcast many years ago?
Have a listen to the episodes here!





  
    
      

        
          
            
          
        

        

          
            Chordcast Episode 1: Artificial Ian
          

          
            
              Feb 14, 2019
            
          

          
            We talk to one of our Health Service Modelling Associates (HSMAs) Simon Philpott about his role, how the HSMA programme has helped to bring modelling and simulation methods into the decision making process within his organisation, and how his project saw him try to better understand how to make better surgical cancellations using Artificial Intelligence.

          

          
            
              
                
                  
                     Listen on Apple Podcasts 
                  
                
                  
                     Listen on Podbean 
                  
                
              
            
             Additional Resources 
          

        

      
    
  
    
      

        
          
            
          
        

        

          
            Chordcast Episode 2: Ambulantics
          

          
            
              Apr 10, 2019
            
          

          
            In our second episode of CHORDCast, we interview one of our original Health Service Modelling Associates - Hannah Trebilcock from Devon Air Ambulance (and formerly of South West Ambulance Service) - about her work modelling for the ambulance service, and her aspirations for bringing modelling, simulation and Artificial Intelligence techniques to the work of Devon Air Ambulance.
